ValidationRule.description: Case Category,case detail is mandatory if Case Origin is Email
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), OR(RecordType.Id = '01220000000Uo97',RecordType.Id ='01211000000Cv1j'), ISPICKVAL( Origin , 'Email'), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c, "") ,ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c, ""), ISPICKVAL (Status , 'Closed')
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Case Category and Case Detail is mandatory if Case Origin is Email
